issues.sample: I have had my car for almost 6 months and in that time frame twice my car while driving on the highway my car went into limp mode and was not responding. I was unable to accelerate. It was almost like I wasn’t able to control my car. All lights on the dash came on. I recieved DTC

narrative.headline: What 2023 Genesis G70 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 19 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (32% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
